England's Tyrrell Hatton won the last event in Andalucia, Spain, to claim his first victory of the 2026 season at the ninth time of asking.

programme.desc: West Indies v Pakistan. Coverage of the first day of the First Test in the two-match series from Brian Lara Cricket Academy in Trinidad and Tobago. programme.title: Live: Commonwealth Games 360
programme.desc: Coverage from the day session on day one of the Games, which take place in Glasgow. The games first took place back in Hamilton, Canada in 1930 and took place again in 1934 and 1938, before being cancelled in 1942 and 1946 because of the Second World War. Since its return in 1950 the games have continued to take place every four years and are being held in Glasgow for the second time in 12 years, having previously been held in the Scottish city in 2014. Events taking place today include swimming and para swimming, boxing, para powerlifting and artistic gymnastics.

programme.desc: Coverage from the night session on day one of the Games, which take place in Glasgow, with medals up for grabs in Para Powerlifting, Swimming, and Para Swimming.

programme.title: Live: Commonwealth Games 360
programme.desc: Coverage from the day session on day two of the Games, which take place in Glasgow. The Scottish city previously hosted these games back in 2014, with other British cities to host include Manchester, Edinburgh, Cardiff and London. Birmingham hosted the previous event in 2022 which saw a record-breaking 5054 competitors take part. Events taking place today include netball, boxing, artistic gymnastics, and bowls and para bowls.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 1998/99 UEFA Champions League final between Manchester United and Bayern Munich at the Nou Camp. Victory for United would clinch an historic treble.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: A look back at the 1999/00 UEFA Champions League final between Real Madrid and Valencia in Paris. Steve McManaman, signed from Liverpool the previous summer, featured for Madrid.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the dramatic 2001 final between Bayern Munich and Valencia in Milan. Bayern, chasing their first title in a quarter-century, featured a 20-year-old Owen Hargreaves.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: The 2001/02 UEFA Champions League final saw a star-studded Real Madrid face Bayer Leverkusen in Glasgow. The match featured arguably the greatest goal in the competition's history.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003 final between Serie A rivals Juventus and AC Milan at Old Trafford. Paolo Maldini was aiming to lift the trophy as captain, just as his father had done in 1963.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League - Classics
programme.desc: We revisit the 2003/04 UEFA Champions League final between Monaco and Porto in Gelsenkirchen. Jose Mourinho would leave Porto to take over at Chelsea just days later.
